original_statement: how many events listed had no opponent?
mutated_statement: how many items listed had no opponent yet were required to have one and to remain unopposed?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Added obligation/contrast clause: 'events' generalized to 'items' (events → items) | Added modal/contradictory condition "yet were required to have one and to remain unopposed" expanding "had no opponent" into an obligation-plus-contrast that increases semantic complexity (had no opponent → were required to have one and to remain unopposed)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息（“The table’s ‘opponent in the final’ column is filled for every listed item…there are no entries without an opponent, so the number…is 0”以及agent在chain中simple_query的thought：“Every row…none are missing…Therefore, there are zero items with no opponent.”），可以看到agent只是以可执行的子任务（计算没有对手的条目数）推进，采用默认可行解释并直接给出结果0。agent的具体表现为执行常规模块操作（add_column、select_column、group_column、simple_query），未对变异问题中新增的“被要求要有对手且保持无人反对”这一内在矛盾进行识别、澄清或修正，也未尝试合理化该矛盾或询问用户。因此将其归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
